prs.title: Merge main into staging
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Merge PR aggregating two hotfixes (marketplace uniqueness scoping + Bedrock toolConfig fix) plus a significant AWS Marketplace URL feature across AI agents, schema migrations, UI components, and E2E/unit tests — substantial breadth even if the individual pieces landed in separate PRs.

prs.title: feat: add product from AWS Marketplace URL + edit company name
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Full-stack feature adding AWS Marketplace URL-based product creation and inline company-name editing, spanning server actions, UI components, an AWS API integration layer, and E2E tests across 10 files.

prs.title: fix(studio): Bedrock toolConfig on competitive-analysis finalize (prod hotfix)
prs.author: Chad
prs.rationale: Targeted hotfix correcting Bedrock toolConfig structure on competitive-analysis finalize with a focused agent change and a dedicated unit test suite to cover the regression.

prs.title: fix(readiness): scope Product.marketplaceListingId unique per company (prod hotfix)
prs.author: Chad
prs.rationale: Scoped database-level fix changing a global unique constraint to a per-company composite unique on marketplaceListingId, including schema migration and unit tests.

prs.title: fix(automation): enforce tenant isolation on automation actions
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Security-focused fix enforcing tenant isolation across automation actions and the assistant agent, touching multiple AI control-plane files and server actions with meaningful logic changes and unit test coverage.

prs.title: fix(studio): enqueue BTS generation directly from assessment + strategy slides
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Small wiring fix to enqueue BTS generation directly from two slide/node components, a minimal targeted change across 25 lines in 2 files.

prs.title: Revert #475 (guided-experience UI / action-needed tray) out of staging
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Revert of a sizeable guided-experience UI feature (17 files, 386 lines restored) — reverting complex UI/state work requires careful reconciliation and is not trivial, but the cognitive effort is lower than the original implementation.

prs.title: Terraform IaC foundation for AWS Cognito migration
prs.author: Chad
prs.rationale: Greenfield Terraform IaC foundation covering bootstrap, multi-env configs, CI/CD workflow integration, and Cognito migration plumbing across 44 files and 2462 custom lines — a major architectural infrastructure effort.

prs.title: Sm 565/guided experience UI
prs.author: Mauro
prs.rationale: New guided-experience UI system with a multi-component tray, task cards, inline prompts, assignee selectors, CRM connect panel, and AppShell integration across 1398 lines and 17 files.

prs.title: Studio: move BTS & Competitive Analysis generation to background workers
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Major architectural shift moving BTS and Competitive Analysis generation to BullMQ background workers, introducing new AI entrypoints, schema/migration for generation runs, updated studio UI components, and polling hooks across 26 files and ~1890 lines.

prs.title: fix(docker): ship docs/ into runner image so admin docs load
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Trivial single-line Dockerfile fix to include the docs/ directory in the runner image.

prs.title: fix(docker): ship docs/ into runner image so admin docs load
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Duplicate of #471 — same trivial Dockerfile docs/ inclusion fix, single file, 5 lines.

prs.title: Playbook editing + AI assistant guided flow
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Large feature combining playbook editing UI, AI assistant guided flow, automation agent tooling, schema migrations for guided-flow events, performance pages, and admin tooling across 35 files and 1735 lines of custom code.

stories.name: AWS Marketplace Product Integration
stories.rationale: Enabled users to add products directly from AWS Marketplace URLs while fixing a data integrity issue ensuring marketplace listing IDs are unique per company.

stories.name: AI Studio Background Processing & Reliability
stories.rationale: Moved BTS and Competitive Analysis generation to background workers for better performance, fixed a Bedrock toolConfig bug in competitive analysis, and enabled direct BTS generation queuing from assessment and strategy slides.

stories.name: Guided Experience UI Rollout
stories.rationale: Introduced the guided experience UI and action-needed tray, then temporarily reverted it from staging to address stability concerns before re-release.

stories.name: AWS Cognito Authentication Migration Foundation
stories.rationale: Established the Terraform infrastructure-as-code foundation required to migrate user authentication to AWS Cognito.

stories.name: Playbook Editing with AI-Assisted Guided Flow
stories.rationale: Delivered playbook editing capabilities enhanced with an AI assistant guided flow to help users build and refine their business readiness plans.

stories.name: Tenant Isolation Security Enforcement
stories.rationale: Enforced strict tenant isolation on automation actions to prevent cross-tenant data leakage and ensure platform security.

stories.name: Staging Environment Sync
stories.rationale: Merged main branch changes into staging to keep the staging environment up to date with the latest production-ready code.

stories.name: Admin Documentation Availability Fix
stories.rationale: Fixed the Docker runner image to include the docs directory so that admin documentation loads correctly in deployed environments.
